source_notes: 13 games on 2026-06-22 slate (Cubs@Jays from 6-21 was postponed to 2026-08-06 and is not a separate entry). At 6 AM ET all games are in Preview state: get_mlb_game_lineup returns empty player arrays and get_mlb_boxscore exposes no probable starter, so probable pitchers are unresolvable from available MCP endpoints this run. Per project validation rule, pitchers are set TBD rather than copying yesterday's rotation; the 11:30 AM build resolves probables once announced. Yesterday (2026-06-21) player Statcast confirmed live via get_statcast_batter (full 30 day pitch set returned). Statcast rolling velo window not persisted in canonical schema this run.
